comment.body:
my thesis is simple. No emas or smas broken to the downside. Higher highs. Vix still suppressed in the 15 range. There might be local pops from 14 to 15 or 16 however anything below 18 is lack of fear in the market. So Alma's upside levels have way higher probability than the downside levels. Also even if one goes purely by her levels, above centroid and above upside pivot. So up and away we go. 

No point in front running or early loading of puts. We never know if the window of reversion or weakness will come. It can just correct brutally through time and dance around 660-670 level for an entire month and burn premium for both sides.
